title: lippia pumila
intro: Lippia pumila, also known as Dwarf Mexican Oregano or Mexican Marjoram, is a small, shrub-like herb native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lippia pumila include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, alleviate digestive problems, and provide relief from skin irritations. Lippia pumila can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
